description: Deleting or weakening a VPC Service Controls perimeter to unblock a call.
body: Failure mode: a request fails with a VPC-SC violation and someone removes the service from the perimeter or deletes it outright, opening a data-exfiltration path. Detection signals: audit logs show the perimeter modified, previously blocked egress now succeeds broadly, and security review flags the perimeter gap. Do not disable the perimeter to make a call work. Safer fallback: read the violation's unique reason, add a narrowly scoped ingress/egress rule or access level for the specific identity and service, validate in dry-run mode, and treat any perimeter change as human-gated.
